description: Blue suede textured handbag with cream synthetic overlay detailingOne main compartment with two press button closures, one on either sideAn inner zipped pocket on one side and two patch pockets on the other sideA flap across the mouth with a twist clasp closureA patch pocket at front with a twist clasp closureTwo short handles with braided detailing, attached to the bag with metal loopsWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
